title: Modular Pipeline Test
script:
This is a test of the modular pipeline. [Visual: technology abstract] [Transition: fade] [Grade: warm]
Each stage runs independently. [Visual: computer circuit board] [KenBurns: off]
You can edit single scenes. [Visual: code programming] [Style: top] [Color: yellow]
Voice, visuals, and render are separate. [Visual: digital transformation] [FadeIn: 0.3]
Modular pipeline complete. [Visual: success rocket launch] [Transition: zoomblur]
